title: Apotheosis
content: The ascent to godhood didn't pass without problems. You're weak, maybe more human than you were on your journey to become a god. The ascension was a success, but at great cost to your body and mind. You should start gathering divinity and make this new world your own.

title: Divinity
content: Divinity is your basic resource, it's the cumulation of your divine power, your strength as a god so to speak. You will use it for upgrades and more. Speaking of, check the new "Shop"-tab.
